entity_data.publication_caption: Craque, artilheiro e decisivo! 🇨🇴🇧🇷 14 gols no ano, segundo atleta com mais minutos em campo no mundo em 2024 e autor dos dois gols do título da @conmebolrecopa! Jhon Arias ❤️💚

🔊 Ambiente barulhento: os níveis de som atingiram MUITOS decibéis.
Gustavos prontos pra @copinha! Dohmann e Cintra dividem a responsabilidade de liderar os #MlksDeXerém!  Tem mais no link dos stories!

VITÓRIA É MUUUITO FLUMINENSE! Porta do hotel lotada pra receber o #TimeDeGuerreiros, como sempre! Mais tarde, a partir de 19h, tem #TricolorEmTodaTerra! Garanta seu ingresso >> fluminense.futebolcard.com

INFORMAÇÕES DE INGRESSOS PARA BOTAFOGO X FLUMINENSE, NO NILTON SANTOS! Todas as informações no nosso site! ⏰ As vendas para @sociodoflu abrem hoje, às 14h, em botafogo.com.br/ingresso.  💻 As vendas para o público geral abrem na segunda-feira, às 12h, em botafogo.com.br/ingresso. 📍 A torcida Tricolor ficará localizada nos setores sul e oeste inferior. 🚨 Todos os torcedores que comprarem ingresso pela internet, através da plataforma de venda de ingressos do Botafogo deverão acessar o estádio Nilton Santos com a biometria facial. Confira o passo a passo em nosso site!
VEEEEENCEEEE O FLUMINEEEENSEEEE! Com gols de Vagno e João Lourenço, os #MlksDeXerém vencem o Linense na @copinha! VAMOOSSS! #VemQueTem 🇭🇺🇭🇺🇭🇺
Fechamos a preparação! Amanhã tem FLUMINENSE FOOTBALL CLUB em Cariacica!  📸: @lucasmerconphotos/FFC

The image shows a man and a baby standing together indoors, likely in a hotel room or similar setting. The man is wearing a dark polo shirt with the logo "Umbro" and the text "Superbet" on it. He has short, dark hair and is smiling while making a peace sign with his right hand. The baby, dressed in a white sports jersey with green and red accents, is being held by the man. The jersey has a logo on the chest that reads "Fluminense."

In the background, there is a table with various items, including a plate of food, a kettle, and some other small objects. The room appears to be well-lit, with a door visible on the left side of the image. The overall atmosphere seems casual and intimate, suggesting a moment of bonding between the man and the baby.

entity_data.img_caption: The image depicts a lively outdoor scene where a man and a woman are taking a selfie together. The woman next to him is smiling and wearing a light blue top and bright pink shorts. She also has a tattoo on her left arm. In the background, there are several other people, some of whom are also taking photos or looking at something interesting. The setting appears to be a public area with trees and buildings visible in the distance.

The background includes blue curtains and a window, suggesting that the vehicle is moving through an urban area. The overall setting implies that the person might be traveling to or from a sporting event or a related event associated with the Fluminense Football Club.
